title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India:
Costa Coffee India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India!
